seoTitle: Upper Blessington vs Upper Burnie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Blessington and Upper Burnie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Blessington vs Upper Burnie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Blessington and Upper Burnie.
heading: Upper Blessington vs Upper Burnie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Blessington, Tasmania and Upper Burnie, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Burnie has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Upper Blessington (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Blessington or Upper Burnie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Blessington has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Upper Burnie scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Blessington scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Burnie scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Blessington or Upper Burnie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Burnie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
